mob_heads_powers.title: Mob Heads Powers
mob_heads_powers.description: Gives the wearer a status effect based on the mob head equipped
mob_heads_powers.config.label: Head Power
mob_heads_powers.config.description: Individually enable or disable mob head powers
mob_heads_powers.description.description: Descriptions of powers granted by mob heads
mob_heads_powers.description.aggressive_: Powers of heads from agressive overworld mobs
mob_heads_powers.description.aquatic: Powers of heads from aquatic mobs
mob_heads_powers.description.end: Powers of heads from end mobs
mob_heads_powers.description.nether: Powers of heads from nether mobs
mob_heads_powers.description.pets: Powers of heads from pet mobs
mob_heads_powers.description.village_pil: Powers of heads from village and pillage mobs
mob_heads_powers.description.cod: Water breathing but suffocates out of water
mob_heads_powers.description.drowned: More damage in water and rain
mob_heads_powers.description.glow_squid: Water breathing + night vision + glowing but suffocates out of water
mob_heads_powers.description.pufferfish: Gives poison for 30min + curse of binding
mob_heads_powers.description.salmon: Water breathing but suffocates out of water
mob_heads_powers.description.squid: Water breathing but suffocates out of water
mob_heads_powers.description.tadpole: Water breathing and player is 1 block tall but suffocates out of water
mob_heads_powers.description.tropical_fi: Water breathing but suffocates out of water
mob_heads_powers.description.endermite: Teleports up if you fall in void
mob_heads_powers.description.piglin_brut: Mined ores go straight into inventory
mob_heads_powers.description.wither: Permanent bad omen effect + low gravity
mob_heads_powers.description.armadillo: Crouch for high resistance but can't move
mob_heads_powers.description.bat: Night vision + vampirism, but shorter reach + taller
mob_heads_powers.description.panda: 50%% chance to not use vegan food
mob_heads_powers.description.rabbit: Luck, even more with rabbit foot in offhand
mob_heads_powers.description.sheep: Creates waypoint if head is on armor stand
mob_heads_powers.description.sniffer: +20HP, slower + bigger, turns paths into dirt
mob_heads_powers.description.copper_gole: 1-3. Stage: Channeling arrows when thunder + 4. Stage: Channeling arrows when any weather
mob_heads_powers.description.snow_golem: Leaves snow trail, takes damage in rain
mob_heads_powers.description.evoker: Wearing head summons thunder but player is hit by lightning
mob_heads_powers.description.ravager: Player gets bigger +20HP, turns grass into paths
